title: MGNREGA - Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee

sections.content: Legal guarantee of 100 days of wage employment per year to every rural household. Work: water conservation, drought proofing, land development, flood control, rural connectivity. Wage: state-specific (Rs 230-350/day). Payment within 15 days via bank/post office. 15+ crore active job cards.

sections.section_path: MGNREGA > How to Get Job Card
sections.content: Apply to gram panchayat with passport photo + address proof. Job card issued within 15 days to all adult members of household. Free of cost. Job card is property of household. Contains: household details, photo of all adult members, record of employment, wages paid.

Submit written application to gram panchayat for work (individual or group). Work must be provided within 15 days of demand, else unemployment allowance payable. Work within 5 km radius. Facilities: drinking water, shade, first aid, creche (for 6+ workers with children under 6). 1/3 of workers must be women.

Wages via bank account/post office only (no cash). Muster rolls (attendance) publicly available on nrega.nic.in. Social audit by gram sabha mandatory every 6 months. Check payment status: nrega.nic.in > Worker Reports. Complaint: toll-free 1800-345-3626 or state helpline.
